steps.title: Identify the subject
steps.content: The subject of the verb is behavioral economists such as Gee — plural. The phrase whose research focuses on charitable giving is a parenthetical relative clause modifying Gee; it doesn't change the subject.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
Identify the grammar issue: subject-verb agreement. Rule: the verb must agree with the head noun of the subject; intervening clauses do not affect agreement.
  • Choice A — "contend": plural simple present; correctly agrees with plural subject "behavioral economists." ✓
  • Choice B — "contends": singular simple present; does not agree with plural subject. ✗
  • Choice C — "is contending": singular present progressive; does not agree with plural subject. ✗
  • Choice D — "has contended": singular present perfect; does not agree with plural subject and adds an unwarranted perfect-tense aspect. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
